attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_ID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.NAME, MF_GL_LEDGERS.SHORT_NAME, MF_GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ALC_LEDGER_TYPE_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.OBJECT_TYPE_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.LE_LEDGER_TYPE_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.CURRENCY_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.PERIOD_SET_NAME, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ACCOUNTED_PERIOD_TYPE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.FIRST_LEDGER_PERIOD_NAME, MF_GL_LEDGERS.RET_EARN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.SUSPENSE_ALLOWED_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.TRACK_ROUNDING_IMBALANCE_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ENABLE_AVERAGE_BALANCES_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ENABLE_BUDGETARY_CONTROL_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.REQUIRE_BUDGET_JOURNALS_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ENABLE_JE_APPROVAL_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ENABLE_AUTOMATIC_TAX_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.CONSOLIDATION_LEDGER_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.TRANSLATE_EOD_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.TRANSLATE_QATD_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.TRANSLATE_YATD_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.AUTOMATICALLY_CREATED_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.BAL_SEG_VALUE_OPTION_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.BAL_SEG_COLUMN_NAME, MF_GL_LEDGERS.MGT_SEG_VALUE_OPTION_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.BAL_SEG_VALUE_SET_ID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.FUTURE_ENTERABLE_PERIODS_LIMIT, MF_GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_ATTRIBUTES, MF_GL_LEDGERS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, MF_GL_LEDGERS.CREATION_DATE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.CREATED_BY, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ENABLE_RECONCILIATION_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.CREATE_JE_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.DESCRIPTION, MF_GL_LEDGERS.COMPLETION_STATUS_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.CONFIGURATION_ID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.CUM_TRANS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.RES_ENCUMB_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.NET_INCOME_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ROUNDING_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.TRANSACTION_CALENDAR_ID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.DAILY_TRANSLATION_RATE_TYPE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.MGT_SEG_COLUMN_NAME, MF_GL_LEDGERS.MGT_SEG_VALUE_SET_ID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.IMPLICIT_ACCESS_SET_ID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.CRITERIA_SET_ID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.IMPLICIT_LEDGER_SET_ID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.LATEST_OPENED_PERIOD_NAME, MF_GL_LEDGERS.LATEST_ENCUMBRANCE_YEAR, MF_GL_LEDGERS.PERIOD_AVERAGE_RATE_TYPE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.BUDGET_PERIOD_AVG_RATE_TYPE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.BUDGET_PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.SLA_ACCOUNTING_METHOD_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.SLA_ACCOUNTING_METHOD_TYPE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.SLA_DESCRIPTION_LANGUAGE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.SLA_ENTERED_CUR_BAL_SUS_CCID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.SLA_SEQUENCING_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.SLA_BAL_BY_LEDGER_CURR_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.SLA_LEDGER_CUR_BAL_SUS_CCID, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ENABLE_SECONDARY_TRACK_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ENABLE_REVAL_SS_TRACK_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, MF_GL_LEDGERS.CONTEXT, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE1, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE2, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE3, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE4, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE5, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE6, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE7, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE8, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE9, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE10, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE11, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE12, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE13, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE14, MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE15, MF_GL_LEDGERS.SLA_LEDGER_CASH_BASIS_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.COMPLETE_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.COMMITMENT_BUDGET_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGERS.GES_UPDATE_DATE, MF_GL_LEDGERS.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
 MF_GL_LEDGERS
WHERE GES_UPDATE_DATE > to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
